scop 0.0.1
  • Reference

ListDB

Source: R/analysis.R
ListDB.Rd

Retrieves information about databases based on a given species and database name.

ListDB(species = "Homo_sapiens", db = NULL)

Arguments

species

The species for which to retrieve database information. Default is "Homo_sapiens".

db

The pattern to match against the database names. Default is NULL, which matches all databases.

See also

PrepareDB

Examples

ListDB(species = "Homo_sapiens")
#> [1] identifier version    comment    timestamp  date       db_version db_name    file      
#> <0 rows> (or 0-length row.names)
ListDB(species = "Mus_musculus", db = "GO_BP")
#>                                                         identifier version                               comment
#> 1 Rcache v0.1.7 (R package R.cache by Henrik Bengtsson)              0.1.7 3.18.0 nterm:15848|Mus_musculus-GO_BP
#>    timestamp                       date         db_version            db_name
#> 1 1731911559 2024-11-18 14:32:38.567153 3.18.0 nterm:15848 Mus_musculus-GO_BP
#>                                                                                         file
#> 1 /Users/mx/Library/Caches/org.R-project.R/R/R.cache/0df53462fbb8be53a53e159996c7790e.Rcache
